title: Earth, Wind & Fire's Funky Masterpiece
story: Groovy beats filled the air as Earth, Wind & Fire dropped their funky masterpiece in 1977. On November 21, the band released 'All 'N All', their eighth studio album. This musical gem would go on to win Billboard's Album of the Year for 1978, proving that Earth, Wind & Fire's blend of soul, funk, and disco was truly out of this world!
activity_question: What was the name of Earth, Wind & Fire's eighth studio album?
bonus_fact: Earth, Wind & Fire's name combines elements representing the band's diverse musical style.

title: Motown Magic: Two Legendary Groups Unite
story: Soul music fans rejoiced in 1968 when two of Motown's biggest acts joined forces. The Supremes and The Temptations, both chart-topping groups, released their duet 'I'm Gonna Make You Love Me' on November 21. This collaboration brought together the smooth harmonies of both legendary groups, creating a timeless hit that still gets toes tapping today.
activity_question: Which two Motown groups collaborated on the song 'I'm Gonna Make You Love Me'?
activity_choices: The Four Tops and The Marvelettes
The Funk Brothers and The Vandellas
bonus_fact: Motown Records was known as 'Hitsville U.S.A.' because of its many chart-topping songs.

title: Olivia Newton-John's Fitness Anthem Tops Charts
story: Olivia Newton-John's catchy tune 'Physical' raced to the top of the music charts on November 21, 1981. The energetic song about exercise and staying fit became a massive hit. It held the number one spot for an impressive ten weeks, inspiring fans to get moving and grooving along with the music.
activity_question: What was the name of Olivia Newton-John's hit song?
follow_up_question: How long did 'Physical' stay at number one on the charts?

title: Tennis Triumph: Stich's Stunning Victory
story: Rackets clashed and crowds roared as German tennis ace Michael Stich battled American Pete Sampras in 1993. On November 21, Stich's determination paid off. He clinched a thrilling 7-6, 2-6, 7-6, 6-2 victory in Frankfurt, Germany. This win marked Stich's first and only ATP Tour World Championship title, etching his name in tennis history.
activity_question: Where did Michael Stich win his ATP Tour World Championship title?
follow_up_question: Can you name another famous German tennis player?

title: Wrestling Titans Clash in St. Louis
story: Muscles flexed and the crowd roared as Bill Longson faced Lou Thesz in an epic wrestling showdown. On November 21, 1947, Longson emerged victorious in St. Louis, claiming the National Wrestling Association World Heavyweight title. The match thrilled fans and solidified Longson's place in wrestling history.
activity_question: What title did Bill Longson win in this wrestling match?
activity_choices: National Wrestling Association World Heavyweight title
activity_answer: National Wrestling Association World Heavyweight title
follow_up_question: Why do you think winning a world title is important for a wrestler?

title: Baseball Teams Tackle Football
story: Batter up... for football? In 1902, two baseball teams decided to play a whole new ballgame. The Philadelphia Athletics and Phillies formed professional football teams on November 21. They joined the Pittsburgh Stars in the first attempt to create a National Football League. This early league didn't last long, but it paved the way for the NFL we know today.
activity_question: Which two baseball teams formed professional football teams?
follow_up_question: Why do you think baseball teams might have wanted to start football teams?

title: Dominica Shaken by Powerful Quake
story: The ground rumbled and buildings swayed as Dominica faced its most destructive earthquake ever in 2004. On November 21, the island nation trembled, with the northern areas and Portsmouth town bearing the brunt. Neighboring Guadeloupe felt the earth move too. Despite the intense shaking, the resilient islanders banded together to rebuild.
activity_question: Which area of Dominica was most affected by the earthquake?
follow_up_question: How might communities prepare for earthquakes in the future?

title: Measles Outbreak Strikes Congo
story: A dangerous measles outbreak swept through the Democratic Republic of Congo in 2019. The World Health Organization reported on November 21 that this epidemic was the largest and fastest-moving in the world. Sadly, it affected many people. Doctors and aid workers rushed to help, providing vaccines and medical care to those in need.
activity_question: What organization reported on the measles outbreak?
follow_up_question: Why are vaccines important in stopping the spread of diseases like measles?
